---
title: "Module 2: Data transformations"
format: html
---

Before analyzing biological data, it is often necessary to preprocess and transform it. These steps can significantly change how the data is represented and how patterns appear.

**What you’ll explore:**

- Why preprocessing is necessary for biological data  
- The effect of normalization, centering, and scaling  
- How transformations change the structure of the data  
- How preprocessing impacts downstream analyses  

The full content for this module will be released on the morning of the workshop!
